name: Build Prop Test
author: PermsTest
description: Sample native plugin that reads build.prop-style files and Android getprop output, then displays the result in a highlighted dialog.
comments: This sample is intentionally manifest-driven. The handler is implemented by PermsTest native plugin API so the action behaves like built-in app code.

entry.notes: Actions map to handlers registered by dev.perms.test.plugins.PluginActionRegistry.

actions.title: Show build.prop
actions.description: Read /system, /vendor, /product, /odm build.prop files and sorted getprop output.
